heroSubtitle: Connect with licensed therapists, track your mood, and access personalized resources all in one place.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people who have found support and growth through our platform.

items.text: Booking appointments with my doctor has never been easier. I no longer have to wait on hold or travel across the city just for a consultation.
items.author: Fatma Ben Ali

items.text: The mood tracking feature helped me notice patterns I never saw before. My doctor uses it during our sessions and it makes a real difference.
items.author: Youssef Trabelsi

items.text: Being able to chat with my therapist between sessions gives me so much peace of mind. CareLink feels like having support available whenever I need it.
items.author: Mariem Chaabane

pricing.title: Flexible Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your needs and budget. Start your journey to better mental health today.
